mechanism_narrative: Consistent upward trend in real GDP indicates expanding economic output, which supports corporate earnings and drives positive equity returns over the monthly horizon.
failure_condition: Rolling 12-month correlation between GDPC1 growth and SPX 20-day returns is non-positive.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 8%, it signals labor market distress and reduced consumer spending, leading to negative equity returns over the next month unless reversed.
failure_condition: SPX forward 20-day returns are positive in more than 60% of occurrences when UNRATE > 8%.

mechanism_narrative: A joint acceleration in retail sales and housing starts indicates strong consumer and investment demand. When both are rising, the demand momentum is more reliable than either alone, boosting equity prices.
failure_condition: Rank IC of the interaction signal is below 0.05 over any 3-year walk-forward period.

mechanism_narrative: In an environment of elevated inflation, further increases in the CPI erode real earnings and lead to tighter monetary policy, causing negative equity returns over the next week.
failure_condition: During periods with CPIAUCSL > 250, the correlation between CPI changes and SPX 5-day returns is not significantly negative.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production reflects robust manufacturing activity, which is a leading indicator for corporate profits and equity performance over the quarter.
failure_condition: INDPRO quarter-over-quarter growth has no predictive power for SPX 60-day returns beyond a random walk.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in industrial production signals a contraction in the manufacturing sector, which precedes broader economic weakness and negative equity returns.
failure_condition: When INDPRO YoY decline >2%, SPX 20-day returns are positive in at least 30% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in payroll employment and stable or falling fed funds rates creates an environment of improving labor market without monetary tightening, which is highly positive for equities over short horizons.
failure_condition: When PAYEMS growth >0 and FEDFUNDS stable/falling, SPX 5-day returns are not significantly above the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: During economic expansions, positive GDP growth reinforces the existing favorable cycle, supporting equity prices as corporate earnings continue to rise.
failure_condition: During periods when GDPC1 > 13000, GDP growth does not predict SPX 20-day returns with statistical significance.
